problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Piezoelectric. Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
